audience_policies.source_phrase: PLEASE NOTE: This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library. You may then bring it to the Ecotarium to purchase discounted tickets. 50% off discount admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free.

coupon.source_phrase_block: PLEASE NOTE: This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library. You may then bring it to the Ecotarium to purchase discounted tickets. 50% off discount admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free.
